name: I'm in an open display case
description: I'm in an open display case
hints: You are inside a display case. There is a button here that likely controls something important.
PUSH BUTTON to activate it. This may control force fields, doors, or other ship systems.
PUSH BUTTON to trigger its effect, then go EAST to return to the hydroponics room.
notes: Inside an open display case with a button. Accessed from the hydroponics room (room 8). The button likely controls force fields or other ship mechanisms. East exit returns to room 8.
